memory.summary: I have a free afternoon before the Thursday deadline, and while I can relax or do a quick chore now, my project is barely started.
I made a tiny start on a trivial chore, but my project remains barely begun with the Thursday deadline approaching.
I spent 0.5 hours on a trivial chore, making only a tiny progress of 0.09. My project remains barely started despite the Thursday deadline.
I made minimal progress on a trivial chore, but the afternoon is slipping away while my project remains barely started.
I made significant progress on the term project, realizing that investing time now prevents future crunch and reduces Thursday stress.
I spent another hour on a trivial chore, yet my project remains barely started with a Thursday deadline looming.
I spent an hour on a trivial chore, yet my project remains barely started with the Thursday deadline looming.
I completed a trivial chore, but my term project remains barely started despite the Thursday deadline.
I've spent three consecutive hours on trivial chores, yet my term project remains barely started with a Thursday deadline looming.
Despite making small progress on a trivial chore, the deadline is now under an hour away and the task remains unfinished.
The trivial chore deadline passed at 22:00 while I was only 36% done. I wasted time on low-priority tasks and now face an unfinished requirement.
After wasting three hours on a trivial chore, I only reached 37% completion while my energy is critically low and the deadline has already passed.
